name: searchPrograms
description: Search programs and sessions for this facility using Bond's native filters. Use for pricing, age-range, registration, and broader catalog questions. Call when the caller asks what programs, classes, or activities are available; about pricing, age ranges, prerequisites, or registration dates; or is browsing the catalog.

function.name: searchPrograms
function.description: Search programs and sessions for this facility. Use for pricing, age-range, registration, and catalog questions.

search.description: Keyword from the caller, such as public skate, learn to skate, private lessons, or spring hockey. Leave blank only when the caller is broadly browsing.

startDate.description: ISO date when the caller mentions a time window like today, tomorrow, Saturday, or this week.

endDate.description: ISO date for the end of the requested time window.

messages.content: Let me look that up for you.
